title: Replace all 'EduManage' branding with 'Nirgrantha' across post-login pages and footer

requirements.summary: Replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' with 'Nirgrantha' in all post-login frontend components including footer, dashboard shells, and sub-components
acceptanceCriteria: The post-login footer reads '© 2026 Nirgrantha. All rights reserved.' instead of '© 2026 EduManage. All rights reserved.'
No text, label, copyright notice, or any UI element anywhere in the app displays 'EduManage' after the change
All dashboard headers, footers, and sub-pages show 'Nirgrantha' branding consistently
The SmartCampus Connect logo area in the footer does not reference 'EduManage'
Searching the entire frontend source for the string 'EduManage' (case-insensitive) returns zero matches in rendered output

file_operations.description: Search and replace all occurrences of 'EduManage' (case-insensitive) with 'Nirgrantha' in the main app component, including any footer or branding text that appears after authentication
Replace all 'EduManage' references with 'Nirgrantha' in the student dashboard shell, including headers, footers, and any branding elements
Replace all 'EduManage' references with 'Nirgrantha' in the faculty dashboard shell, including headers, footers, and any branding elements
Replace all 'EduManage' references with 'Nirgrantha' in the institute dashboard shell, including headers, footers, and any branding elements
